title: TimeDef
description: The world clock's shape (plan/05 §1): real-time scale, calendar, start. One per world (the lowest-sorted ID wins if several load).

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.

minutesPerGameDay.description: Real minutes per full game day (e.g. 20 = a day every 20 wall-clock minutes at 1× tick rate).

seasons.description: Season def IDs in calendar order.
